action.reasoning: Observation: iter 13 command found epoch_30.pt as best existing checkpoint with val BA 0.8584. Current predict.py includes 10-crop TTA but hasn't been evaluated. Analysis: TTA could boost test performance by 2-5%, potentially surpassing current best 0.602. Decision: update predict.py to support multi-checkpoint averaging (for future ensemble), immediately submit eval on epoch_30.pt with TTA to measure gain. If insufficient, next iteration will ensemble top-3 checkpoints.
